arts.ttl: Villa sign forward Malen from Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Aston Villa announce the signing of forward Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Malen signs for Villa from Dortmund
arts.sum: Aston Villa have completed the signing of Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund in a deal worth a total of just over £20m.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'open' to defender exit amid Borussia Dortmund, Inter Milan interest
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Oleksandr Zinchenko is reportedly attracting interest from Borussia Dortmund, who are now battling Inter Milan for the loan services of the Ukrainian.

Aston Villa is delighted to announce the signing of Dutch international Donyell Malen from Borussia Dortmund. The 25-year-old forward, who has over 100 career club goals, joins from the German giants for an undisclosed fee. Malen helped Dortmund reach the Champions League final last season and netted 13 Bundesliga goals. With nine goals in 41 international appearances, Malen is a key player for the Netherlands and represented his country at UEFA Euro 2024. He came through the ranks at PSV Eindhoven and scored 40 goals in 80 appearances before signing for Dortmund. Welcome, Donyell! 🇳🇱

arts.ttl: Match Thread: Borussia Dortmund and Holstein Kiel in Midweek Bundesliga
arts.sum: Use those and don’t share any illegal streams in the comments. No abusing of other commentators or match officials.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag continues to maintain relationship sith Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Erik ten Hag was spotted at Borussia Dortmund’s 3-2 loss to Bayer Leverkusen on Friday evening. The former Manchester United manager has been a regular visitor to…

arts.ttl: Report: Borussia Dortmund Pursuing Arsenal’s Oleksandr Zinchenko
arts.sum: BVB are interested in a loan for Zinchenko, but Arsenal are pushing to include an obligation to buy in any deal for the player, with the fee reported to be ~€20m. Another day, another report linking Borussia Dortmund to an unfavored Premier League player.

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Visit Holstein Kiel
arts.sum: The two sides have played each other twice in the DFB Pokal, in two of Dortmund’s last three DFB Pokal winning campaigns, but today’s match marks the first league game. They lead the league in total goals conceded at 41 and have only notched two wins in sixteen games this season.

arts.ttl: Dortmund reportedly exploring deal for Arsenal player
arts.sum: According to a report, Borussia Dortmund are considering a move for Arsenal's Oleksandr Zinchenko.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star pushing for exit as Borussia Dortmund open talks
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have opened talks with Arsenal for Oleksandr Zinchenko, who is 'keen to leave,' according to German media. According to Sky Germany, Borussia Dortmund are in ongoing talks with Arsenal over Zinchenko after approaching the Gunners in recent days.
